content:
who eyed the frosted contents on its maiden voyage from counter, to maker’s-hand, to dancing along the air, to taker’s-hand.

Anthony accepts the drink while announcing he's not to drink the drink.

Chris refuses the battle call back at his desk

and falls prey to the beckoning of the pleasures offered by the couch.

Chris asks of Anthony’s recent workings;

Anthony inflates his achievements, dancing around specificities, and informs Chris on a series of fleeting ideas

but: unable to stick to one. His inflation deflated.

Offering a lot of excuses, Anthony is unable to convince Chris (and Anthony doesn’t buy it much himself either).

Anthony details his recent misadventures in nomadic life from the prior year; the cycle of despair to creation Anthony grew accustomed to, now presents as evident, no longer marches in the same pattern. The well, once refreshing on occasion, renders no thing but empty buckets of late.

Chris feigns sympathy; not the emotions, the excuse of it all.
context: From document: Up The Hill Backwards — chunk 3 (chunk 3/5)
